title: Administer remote computers by using Windows PowerShell
summary: Administer remote computers by using Windows PowerShell

sections.title: Administer remote computers by using Windows PowerShell
sections.summary: Administer remote computers by using Windows PowerShell

lessons.title: Manage single and multiple computers by using Windows PowerShell remoting
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to use remoting to perform administration on remote computers.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-single-multiple-computers-use-windows-powershell-remoting/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage single and multiple computers by using Windows PowerShell remoting

lessons.title: Use advanced Windows PowerShell remoting techniques
lessons.content_md:
This module covers some useful advanced techniques that help overcome the limitations of basic Windows PowerShell remoting.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-advanced-windows-powershell-remoting-techniques/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use advanced Windows PowerShell remoting techniques

lessons.title: Manage persistent connections to remote computers by using Windows PowerShell sessions
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to establish and manage persistent connections to remote computers, known as Windows PowerShell sessions or PSSessions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-persistent-connections-to-remote-computers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage persistent connections to remote computers by using Windows PowerShell sessions

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Administer remote computers by using Windows PowerShell
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Administer remote computers by using Windows PowerShell**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
